scripts.seed: cd server && node -e "require('./index.js'); const fetch = require('node-fetch'); fetch('http://localhost:3000/api/seed', {method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({secret:require('dotenv').config({path:'server/.env'}).parsed.SEED_SECRET||'change_me_in_env'})}).then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{console.log(d);process.exit()}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
